details: The agent navigated to the correct URL (https://github.com/facebook/react/issues), took a screenshot to verify the page content, and reported 4 specific, technical issue titles with issue numbers and timestamps. The open issue count of 820 is in the hundreds as expected. Issue #36175 has a truncated title which is a minor gap, but the other 4 titles are specific and technically plausible React issues. The agent clearly browsed the actual page rather than hallucinating.
